title: nephrodium baileyanum
intro: Nephrodium baileyanum, also known as the Baileyan fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Nephrodium baileyanum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and promote wound healing. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its availability and use may be limited due to its rare occurrence in the wild.
